directive: Rewrite the ask_chatgpt library from scratch in Python: archive v1, rebuild a Web-UI-mirroring CLI per docs/REWRITE-SPEC.md (approved 2026-06-18). Standing mission: develop & maintain ask-chatgpt (programmatic interaction with chatgpt.com via CDP-attached Chromium). Most-pressing deliverable: scrape https://chatgpt.com/c/6a316aa8-5dc8-83ea-9014-b8ea38dabc31 into a faithful transcript — built on the proper capture+transcript spine, not hacked.
spec: docs/REWRITE-SPEC.md (full) + team/charter.md 'Rework spec' (worker-facing distillation). Supersedes docs/DESIGN-SPEC.md.

mission_queue.title: Intake rework requirements via grill-me; distill into spec; populate mission queue.
mission_queue.notes: DONE 2026-06-18. Grill-me resolved 12 design branches with the operator; spec authored to docs/REWRITE-SPEC.md + charter Rework-spec section; queue populated below. DESIGN-SPEC.md marked superseded.

mission_queue.title: Archive v1 library + scaffold fresh Python package.
mission_queue.notes: UNATTENDED, dispatchable now. NON-DESTRUCTIVE: first `git stash push -u` the dirty src/ask_chatgpt/driver.py (uncommitted v1 M-011b WIP — superseded by rewrite; preserve, do not destroy). Then git mv the committed v1 src/ask_chatgpt/ to archive/lib-v1/ (preserve history). Scaffold a fresh src/ask_chatgpt/ skeleton + pyproject entry + mock test substrate scaffolding per REWRITE-SPEC §2 module layout. Keep tests/ runnable (uv run pytest). NEVER touch 'stable'; NEVER uv tool install/upgrade/reinstall; never git push. Work on main or a feature branch off it.

mission_queue.title: Attended ground-truth CDP probe — de-risk the backend-api/project/selector assumptions.
mission_queue.notes: ATTENDED — requires the operator's signed-in Chromium with CDP on :9222 (coordinate a window with the operator). Verify REWRITE-SPEC §16 checklist: (1) backend-api conversation endpoint + canonical-markdown shape, reachable via in-page fetch; (2) Deep Research turn representation (report/citations/search meta) + attachment ref shape; (3) project send/create mechanics under /g/g-p-.../c/...; (4) live selectors (composer, send, model menu+options incl. family submenu, tools menu, copy button, new-user-turn detection, login-wall/Cloudflare markers); (5) clipboard fallback viability; (6) empirical rate/backoff signals. SAFETY: inspect ONLY tool-opened tabs (never operator tabs — leak risk); preflight curl :9222; never quit browser (detach only); login/Cloudflare challenge -> STOP + HUMAN-ACTION-NEEDED. Output: a verified findings doc that M3 consumes. The backend-api hypothesis is load-bearing — if false, the capture design changes.

mission_queue.title: Best-of-N detailed design (informed by M2 findings).
mission_queue.notes: Non-editing best-of-N: parallel design lenses (library API + module structure; persistence/schema; capture + completion detection; concurrency/tab-pool/rate; CLI/loop ergonomics) + a synthesizer + an independent verifier. Produce the concrete module/API/schema design the implementation missions follow. Use parallel read-only Plan subagents per the durable lesson.

mission_queue.title: Phase-1 offline core (TDD, mock-proven).
mission_queue.notes: Single-editor implementation (source-mutating => single worker) surrounded by M3 design + independent verification. Build: library API skeleton (create/ask/scrape/history/fetch/status), per-conversation store (JSONL + index + attachments), mock channel, completion detection (poll + DOM-consensus fallback), error taxonomy (+PromptNotSubmittedError), eager-write + partial-salvage, stdout+--out. Full mock acceptance via `uv run pytest`; falsifiable tests; inspect artifacts not exit codes.

mission_queue.title: Backend-api capture + scrape + verified send over cdp.
mission_queue.notes: Attended cdp. Implement backend-api capture (canonical markdown, DR, attachment metadata) + fail-closed UI/annotation fallback; scrape command (stream-to-disk, paginate); send-via-UI with new-turn verification + idle-reload + wait-for-composer (gotcha-4 fix). Verify fidelity (no ambiguous math) on samples.

mission_queue.title: Run the scrape of /c/6a316aa8... + verify fidelity (PRESSING DELIVERABLE).
mission_queue.notes: ATTENDED. scrape the long math conversation --with-attachments into the operator's chosen --data-dir; deliver JSONL + rendered markdown export. Verify acceptance: diff sample turns (incl. a DR turn and a heavy-math turn) vs web-UI copy ground truth — \widehat, \ne, \frac{}{} must round-trip. This is the operator's most-pressing output; reachable as soon as the capture path (M5) is proven.

mission_queue.title: Model/tools selection + keep-pushing loop + tab-pool/rate.
mission_queue.notes: General label-driven model + tools (validated: Pro Extended, Deep Research); keep-pushing loop (persistent session, verify each turn); managed tab pool (lazy-open, idle-evict, LRU) + adaptive send-rate (backoff + politeness floor). Attended verification for real model/tool selection. Adversarially review any GPT-facing prompt.

mission_queue.title: Independent best-of-N verification + re-issue VERIFICATION.md (terminal).
mission_queue.notes: Terminal mission. Diverse verification panel (correctness / edge-cases / spec-conformance / adversarial-refutation / reproduction) over authoritative outputs; falsifiability + prompt-quality lens. Re-issue VERIFICATION.md honestly for the new library (NOT green-exit). Confirm all REWRITE-SPEC gotcha fixes hold.
